title: ColdTom's Better Enchanted
description: Gives unique textures and animations to enchanted books
body:
ColdTom's Enchanted Books.

One of the following mod is required for this pack to work properly:

> Optifine

> CIT Resewn

Thanks for download

.

.

.

All enchanted books.

Book animations are not shown here.
